{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232018035CFF4151012DC23CCC59"}"},"total":1181},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562371291356447512","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错，虽然说第四天灾有各种各样的，但是这个看的很爽，而且不像其他第四天灾那样特别快，成长的特别快，给人看着就没那么有意思 主要是写的特别详细，写的特别好 你老发这么一点儿给谁看呀？谁看谁不看，让隔壁老外看见，还以为我们看不起呢","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":6,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268283C23CCC59%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227562371291356447512%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227549940884318473240%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760754790,"group_id":"7549940884318473240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8mQsg7GyudC3VLjKAIKpdyUZcPUtvAKE33KBnUyb1YC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/10a45fa58520422d9fd66ed5c635697a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790852&x-signature=eZfZw0TwHXk0BWS5%2Fvu8MlVi1Sw%3D","user_id":"1778339064588336","user_name":"这破班我……"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1778339064588336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549940884318473240","book_info":{"abstract":"秦天穿越了，成为了西游世界一座名为浪浪山的不知名山头的山大王，按照剧本不久之后唐僧师徒就会路过这里，而他也将被孙悟空一棒子打死。
好在他成功激活了第四天灾系统，可以从蓝星召唤玩家。
为了不被孙悟空打死，也为了能够在这个妖魔横行的世界活下去，他开始从蓝星招募一名名玩家来为自己打工。
同一时间蓝星上也多出了一款名为黑神话的虚拟游戏，凭借着超高的拟真度和丰富的剧情玩法，这款游戏一跃成为游戏界的黑马，席卷全世界。
在玩家的帮助下，秦天扫平黑风山，荡平黄风岭，攻陷狮驼城，玩家队伍在不断扩张的同时，他的自身实力也飞速提升。
不久后当唐僧师徒来到浪浪山的时候，孙悟空看着浪浪山妖国的千万妖兵人都麻了。
唐僧：”这经不取也罢。“
玉帝：”别来找我了，我也搞不定。“
佛门：”要不我们还是把经书送过去吧。“
狮驼岭三妖：“咱也不知道啊，那群人上来就说要爆了我们。”
蓝星玩家“黑神话太好玩了！”
这个时候秦天发现自己竟然还能去往其他的世界。
哪吒，封神，洪荒。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e6a0bdd75edcd0d0e4665e08d420c93f","author":"仙秦太师","author_id":"","book_id":"7549940884318473240","book_name":"带玩家建妖国，孙悟空人麻了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7549940917226979864","read_count":"56825","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"999404"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"412","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,西游衍生,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f1a310faa36baf18c03ab73fbf68178e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452283&x-signature=afnVr%2FmB9TS2bg7sCQDD4%2Be2%2B9w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111368117166","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232018035CFF4151012DC23CCC59"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du
